items.comment: Gift from friend, it’s too old.

Antarctica, known for its frozen tundra and waddling penguins, might not be the first place you think of when grabbing a cold one… but on April 1st, anything is possible. Thanks for checking in a cold one in early April. Wink wink, nudge nudge. Make sure you're following us @untappd!

items.badge_description: If your mash uses more than 50% wheat, you’ve got yourself a wheat beer. This diverse family includes goses, hefeweizens, American wheat ales, and more! That's 35 different beers in the "Wheat" category! Try 5 more for Level 8!
